text.title: Tailwind Architecture in Production Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Tailwind Architecture in Production end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: check-prerequisites
step.input: Input brief + source-of-truth refs declared in AGENTS.md prerequisites table.
step.action: Verify every prerequisite is reachable and citable. Missing prerequisite → emit structured `skip` decision pointing to the missing item; do not produce a degraded artefact.
step.decision-gate: If `prerequisites_ok` is false, STOP and apply the sibling methodology suggested in the skip decision.

step.name: gather-evidence
step.action: Pull verbatim citations for every non-trivial field declared in `content/02-output-contract.xml`. Reject synthetic / roleplay inputs ("ask the model to imagine the user said...").
step.output: Evidence array with `{source, citation}` pairs per planned field.
step.decision-gate: If any non-trivial field has zero evidence, re-collect or downgrade the field to `N/A` with a one-line justification.

step.name: fill-artefact
step.input: Output-contract schema + evidence array + prior cycle's artefact (if any).
step.action: Fill the artefact per the schema. Carry-forward unchanged values from prior cycle only when `source_last_modified` ≤ prior artefact's `last_touched`.
step.output: Draft artefact conforming to the schema; `status=draft`.

step.name: validate
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-tailwind-architecture.py --file artefact.json`. Resolve all violations before proceeding.
step.decision-gate: If validation fails, fix violations and re-run; never bypass.

step.name: surface-for-review
step.action: Surface a `ready_for_review` flag to the named human reviewer. Agent never sets `status=approved` itself.
step.decision-gate: Reviewer approves → `status=approved`. Reviewer rejects → return to step 2 or 3 with reviewer's notes.
